title: Oort cloud
script_summary: Exploring the mysterious Oort cloud and its role in our solar system.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about the Oort cloud than social media does.
The Oort cloud is a distant, icy shell surrounding our solar system, a remnant from its formation.
It's believed to be home to trillions of comets, but its existence is still theoretical.
Models suggest it extends about 1 light-year from the sun, far beyond Pluto.
Understanding the Oort cloud helps explain comet paths and the solar system's history.
